name: Lovers in Bloom
overview: Moo Goong Hwa is a former boxer. After the death of her husband, she has raised her daughter alone. She now works as a police officer. Meanwhile, Cha Tae Jin is an elite police officer who graduated from the police university. He is full of justice.

trailers.title: Lovers In Bloom | 무궁화 꽃이 피었습니다 [Teaser]
